Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
items.description: Meta might be the next company to make an always-on AI wearable. The company is working on prototype "super sensing" always-aware smart glasses that could continuously record audio and snap photos "every few seconds," according to the Financial Times. items.title: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
items.description: As part of Microsoft's big Xbox "reset," which includes layoffs affecting 3,200 staffers, jettisoning studios, and shifting investments to focus on "higher priority projects," Obsidian Entertainment is changing its plans. items.title: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
items.description: OpenAI is overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." items.title: If Microsoft sold off Xbox, who would even buy it?
items.description: This week, Microsoft took a huge ax to its Xbox business.
